---
title : "Comparison of step sizes for SGD"
author : "Thimoté Dupuch"
date : today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme:
      light: zephyr
      dark: darkly
engine: julia
---

```{julia}
#| echo : false
#| output : false
using Pkg
Pkg.activate("../..")
```


```{julia}
#| output : false
using LinearAlgebra, Random, Statistics, CairoMakie
```


```{julia}
#| output : false
#| echo : false
CairoMakie.set_theme!(theme_latexfonts())
CairoMakie.activate!(type = "svg")
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
blue, orange, green, pink, teal, red, yellow = Makie.wong_colors()
```


```{julia}
Random.seed!(1)

# --- Data Generation ---
d, n = 40, 400
U = svd(randn(d, d)).U
H = U * Diagonal(1 ./ (1:d)) * U'
Hsqrt = sqrt(H)

X = randn(n, d) * Hsqrt
w0 = randn(d)
w0 = w0 / sqrt(dot(w0, H * w0))
y = sign.(X * w0 + randn(n))
R2 = maximum(sum(X .^ 2, dims=2))

# --- Objective ---
obj(w, mu) = mean(max.(1.0 .- y .* (X * w), 0.0)) + (mu / 2) * sum(w .^ 2)

# --- Experiment Runner ---
function run_exp(mu; maxiter_sgd=10_000, maxiter_gd=100_000)
    w_s, w_m, w_g = zeros(d), zeros(d), zeros(d)
    f_s = zeros(maxiter_sgd)
    f_m = zeros(maxiter_sgd)
    f_g = zeros(maxiter_gd)

    # SGD loops
    for t in 1:maxiter_sgd
        f_s[t], f_m[t] = obj(w_s, mu), obj(w_m, mu)

        it = rand(1:n)
        x_it, y_it = X[it, :], y[it]

        # SGD 1/sqrt(t)
        grad_s = ifelse(1.0 - y_it * dot(x_it, w_s) > 0, mu * w_s - y_it * x_it, mu * w_s)
        w_s -= (1.0 / (sqrt(t) * R2)) * grad_s

        # SGD 1/(mu*t)
        grad_m = ifelse(1.0 - y_it * dot(x_it, w_m) > 0, mu * w_m - y_it * x_it, mu * w_m)
        w_m -= (1.0 / (mu * (t + 1))) * grad_m
    end

    # GD loop
    for t in 1:maxiter_gd
        f_g[t] = obj(w_g, mu)
        ind = Float64.(1.0 .- y .* (X * w_g) .> 0)
        w_g -= (1.0 / (mu * (t + 1))) * (mu * w_g - (1.0 / n) * (X' * (y .* ind)))
    end

    return f_s, f_m, f_g[end]
end

# Run both experiments
f_s1, f_m1, f_star1 = run_exp(0.1)
f_s2, f_m2, f_star2 = run_exp(0.001)

# --- Plotting ---
fig = Figure(size=(1200, 900), fontsize=18)

maxiter = 10_000
t_range = 1:maxiter
log_t = log10.(t_range)

# Row 1: mu = 0.1
ax1 = Axis(fig[1, 1], xlabel=L"t", ylabel=L"F(\theta_t) - F(\eta_\ast)",
           title="semi-log plot - μ = 0.1", limits=(1, maxiter, 0, 0.5))
lines!(ax1, t_range, f_s1 .- f_star1, color=red, linewidth=2, label=L"\gamma_t = 1/(R^2 t^{1/2})")
lines!(ax1, t_range, f_m1 .- f_star1, color=blue, linewidth=2, label=L"\gamma_t = 1/(\mu t)")
axislegend(ax1, position=:rt)

ax2 = Axis(fig[1, 2], xlabel=L"\log_{10}(t)", ylabel=L"\log_{10}[F(\theta_t) - F(\eta_\ast)]",
           title="log-log plot - μ = 0.1")
lines!(ax2, log_t, log10.(max.(f_s1 .- f_star1, 1e-16)), color=red, linewidth=2, label=L"\gamma_t = 1/(R^2 t^{1/2})")
lines!(ax2, log_t, log10.(max.(f_m1 .- f_star1, 1e-16)), color=blue, linewidth=2, label=L"\gamma_t = 1/(\mu t)")
axislegend(ax2, position=:rt)

# Row 2: mu = 0.001
ax3 = Axis(fig[2, 1], xlabel=L"t", ylabel=L"F(\theta_t) - F(\eta_\ast)",
           title="semi-log plot - μ = 0.001", limits=(1, maxiter, 0, 0.75))
lines!(ax3, t_range, f_s2 .- f_star2, color=red, linewidth=2, label=L"\gamma_t = 1/(R^2 t^{1/2})")
lines!(ax3, t_range, f_m2 .- f_star2, color=blue, linewidth=2, label=L"\gamma_t = 1/(\mu t)")
axislegend(ax3, position=:rt)

ax4 = Axis(fig[2, 2], xlabel=L"\log_{10}(t)", ylabel=L"\log_{10}[F(\theta_t) - F(\eta_\ast)]",
           title="log-log plot - μ = 0.001")
lines!(ax4, log_t, log10.(max.(f_s2 .- f_star2, 1e-16)), color=red, linewidth=2, label=L"\gamma_t = 1/(R^2 t^{1/2})")
lines!(ax4, log_t, log10.(max.(f_m2 .- f_star2, 1e-16)), color=blue, linewidth=2, label=L"\gamma_t = 1/(\mu t)")
axislegend(ax4, position=:rt)

fig
```
